title: Methods should not be empty
description: Methods should not be emptyAnalyze your codeintentionality-completemaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEsuspiciousWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?An empty method is generally considered bad practice and can lead to confusion, readability, and maintenance issues. Empty methods bring no functionality and are misleading to others as they might think the method implementation fulfills a specific and identified requirement.There are several reasons for a method not to have a body:It is an unintentional omission, and should be fixed to prevent an unexpected behavior in production.It is not yet, or never will be, supported. In this case an exception should be thrown.The method is an intentionally-blank override.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

compliant: public abstract void Initialize(); // Compliant: abstract method declaration

checks.description: Check for empty methods that have no meaningful implementation
